tasks.subject: Task 0: ABC additions + per-engine concrete impls + test-local stubs
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add @abstractmethod model_identity(cfg) to both GenerationEngine and ImageEngine ABCs, and patch every in-repo subclass (source + test-local) with a working impl in the same commit so the test suite continues to instantiate them.

**Files:** see plan §Task 0 Files block (14 files: 1 ABCs, 10 engine sources, 1 remote_backend, 2 test-local stubs).

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- GenerationEngine.model_identity is @abstractmethod returning str.
- ImageEngine.model_identity is @abstractmethod returning str.
- All 7 GenerationEngine concrete subclasses provide an impl.
- All 3 ImageEngine concrete subclasses provide an impl.
- Both test-local subclasses provide an impl.
- pixi run test passes (no TypeError: Can't instantiate abstract class).

**Verify:** `pixi run test -q` — green.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/interfaces.py", "src/kinoforge/core/remote_backend.py", "src/kinoforge/engines/hosted/__init__.py", "src/kinoforge/engines/diffusers/__init__.py", "src/kinoforge/engines/fal/__init__.py", "src/kinoforge/engines/comfyui/__init__.py", "src/kinoforge/engines/bedrock_video/__init__.py", "src/kinoforge/engines/fake/__init__.py", "src/kinoforge/image_engines/replicate/__init__.py", "src/kinoforge/image_engines/fal/__init__.py", "src/kinoforge/image_engines/fake/__init__.py", "tests/core/test_profiles.py", "tests/core/test_interfaces.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["GenerationEngine.model_identity is @abstractmethod returning str", "ImageEngine.model_identity is @abstractmethod returning str", "All 7 GenerationEngine concrete subclasses provide an impl", "All 3 ImageEngine concrete subclasses provide an impl", "Both test-local subclasses provide an impl", "pixi run test passes with no TypeError"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Per-engine unit tests + cross-engine ABC contract test
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add 2 unit tests per concrete engine impl (happy path + empty fallback), plus one cross-engine contract test iterating registered engines.

**Files:** see plan §Task 1 Files block (9 engine test modules + 1 new ABC contract test).

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Every engine has 2 tests: native source returns expected slug; empty returns "".
- tests/core/test_engine_abc_contract.py iterates engine registry; model_identity({}) == "" for every registered engine.
- All tests fail before Task 0 lands; all pass after.

**Verify:** `pixi run test tests/engines tests/image_engines tests/core/test_engine_abc_contract.py -v` — green.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/engines/test_hosted.py", "tests/engines/test_diffusers.py", "tests/engines/test_fal.py", "tests/engines/test_comfyui.py", "tests/engines/test_bedrock_video.py", "tests/engines/test_fake.py", "tests/image_engines/test_replicate.py", "tests/image_engines/test_fal.py", "tests/image_engines/test_fake.py", "tests/core/test_engine_abc_contract.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/engines tests/image_engines tests/core/test_engine_abc_contract.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Every engine has 2 tests", "ABC contract test passes for every registered engine", "All tests green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Orchestrator clip-stage wiring
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace hard-coded `_model = cfg.spec.get("model", "")` with `session.engine.model_identity(cfg.model_dump())`. Log one WARNING per deploy() when empty. Cover with 2 tests.

**Files:** src/kinoforge/core/orchestrator.py:1108-1126, tests/core/test_orchestrator.py.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- _model sourced from session.engine.model_identity(cfg.model_dump()).
- Empty return emits exactly one WARNING naming engine + 'will render filename slug as unknown'.
- _model threaded into GenerateClipStage(... model=_model).
- 2 new tests pass.

**Verify:** `pixi run test tests/core/test_orchestrator.py -v -k model_identity && pixi run test -q` — green.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/orchestrator.py", "tests/core/test_orchestrator.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/core/test_orchestrator.py -v -k model_identity && pixi run test -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["_model sourced from session.engine.model_identity(cfg.model_dump())", "Empty emits exactly one WARNING", "_model threaded into GenerateClipStage", "2 new tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Orchestrator keyframe-stage wiring
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Mirror Task 2 for keyframe path: read resolved_image_engine.model_identity(...) instead of cfg.keyframe.spec.model. WARNING on empty. Cover with 1 test.

**Files:** src/kinoforge/core/orchestrator.py:1053-1071, tests/core/test_orchestrator.py.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- _kf_model sourced from resolved_image_engine.model_identity(...).
- Empty return emits one WARNING naming the image engine.
- KeyframeStage(..., model=_kf_model) threads the value.
- Keyframe test passes.

**Verify:** `pixi run test tests/core/test_orchestrator.py -v -k keyframe_model_identity && pixi run test -q` — green.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/orchestrator.py", "tests/core/test_orchestrator.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/core/test_orchestrator.py -v -k keyframe_model_identity && pixi run test -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["_kf_model sourced from resolved_image_engine.model_identity", "Empty emits one WARNING", "KeyframeStage threads the value", "Keyframe test passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Integration regression lock — no unknown slug for example YAMLs
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Walk every YAML in examples/configs/ (skipping local-fake.yaml + fake engines), resolve engine, call model_identity(cfg.model_dump()), assert non-empty result. Locks the spec invariant.

**Files:** Create tests/integration/test_no_unknown_slug_for_example_configs.py.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Test enumerates every examples/configs/*.yaml.
- For each: model_identity(...) returns non-empty.
- Skips local-fake.yaml + any yaml whose engine kind == 'fake'.
- Failing YAML must be fixed or skip-listed with rationale; assertion MUST NOT be weakened.

**Verify:** `pixi run test tests/integration/test_no_unknown_slug_for_example_configs.py -v` — green.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/integration/test_no_unknown_slug_for_example_configs.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test tests/integration/test_no_unknown_slug_for_example_configs.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Test enumerates every examples/configs/*.yaml", "Non-empty model_identity asserted for each (skipping fake)", "Failing YAML must be fixed or skip-listed, not assertion-weakened"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: PROGRESS + README + final gate
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Append Phase 48 closeout block to PROGRESS.md; strike through Phase 46/47 carry-forwards; README touch-up; final test/lint/typecheck gate.

**Files:** PROGRESS.md, README.md (if relevant section exists).

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- PROGRESS.md new ### Phase 48 — Layer 8 (model_identity ABC) section with 5 task SHAs.
- Phase 46/47 unknown-slug carry-forward bullets struck through with CLOSED by Phase 48.
- README Output/Sink/Filenames section notes engine-native identity (skip if no relevant section).
- pixi run test -q green; pixi run lint green; pixi run typecheck green.

**Verify:** `pixi run test -q && pixi run lint && pixi run typecheck` — all green.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["PROGRESS.md", "README.md"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run test -q && pixi run lint && pixi run typecheck", "acceptanceCriteria": ["PROGRESS.md Phase 48 block with 5 SHAs", "Phase 46/47 carry-forwards struck through CLOSED by Phase 48", "README updated or skip-rationale documented", "All gates green"]}
```
